title: AuditReceipt
description: Completion receipt for an auto-audit session. Written by auto-audit Step 7 on termination. Distinct from cycle-level stage-receipt.json.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Currently only '1.0' is valid.

verdict.description: Final audit verdict corresponding to auto-audit terminal states.

final_compliance_score.description: Compliance percentage from the last completed audit cycle. Range: 0-100.

compliance_threshold.description: The threshold configured for this session. Score >= threshold = ACCEPTABLE.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the audit session terminated.

cycle_count.description: Total number of audit cycles completed (minimum 1 — at least one audit ran).

gap_count.description: Number of gaps remaining at termination. Null if not tracked.

next_steps.description: Suggested next steps based on verdict. Array of human-readable strings.

related_orchestrate_session.description: Session ID of the most recent auto-orchestrate session remediated against. Null if none.
